message:
style(demo-showcase): use idiomatic Rust patterns in log_search and responsive_demo

log_search.rs:
- Changed `tick_count % LOG_BURST_INTERVAL == 0` to
  `tick_count.is_multiple_of(LOG_BURST_INTERVAL)` for clarity
- Merged nested if statements into a single if-let chain for
  search_info result checking

responsive_demo.rs:
- Merged nested if statement into the if-let pattern match,
  eliminating unnecessary nesting depth

These changes improve readability without altering behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
